What We Do

Five tools built for
the algorithm.

Post Optimizer

Paste your draft caption and let AI rewrite it for maximum reach. Tightens your hook, sharpens your CTA, and adapts tone for each platform Instagram, TikTok, LinkedIn, and more.

Virality Calculator

Score your content before you post. Our model analyzes your caption, hashtags, and post timing to predict engagement potential and tell you exactly what to tweak to go viral.

Cringe Calculator

Runs your post through an AI cringe detector trained on thousands of low-performing posts. Flags overused phrases, try-hard energy, and hashtag spam before your audience does.

Clip Studio

Upload a long-form video or drop a link and Clip Studio automatically identifies the most engaging moments cutting them into short-form clips ready for Reels, TikTok, and Shorts.

Engagement Graph

Visualise exactly when your audience is online, which post types drive comments vs saves, and how your engagement rate trends over time all in one live, interactive dashboard.

How It Works

Three steps to
going viral.

01

Pick Your Tool

Choose from Post Optimizer, Virality Calculator, Cringe Calculator, Clip Studio, or Engagement Graph. Each tool is purpose-built to tackle a specific part of your content strategy.

02

Upload a File or Drop a Link

Got a photo, video, or draft caption? Upload it directly or just paste a URL from YouTube, TikTok, or Instagram. Social Penguin pulls in the content automatically.

03

Get Results, Post & Grow

Grab your optimized caption, clipped video, or score report. Apply the fixes, post to your platform, and watch the numbers climb.

Our Tools

Five tools.
One platform.

Social Penguin gives content creators an AI-powered edge on every platform. Whether you're optimizing a caption, scoring a video for virality, cutting clips, or reading your engagement data every tool is built to move your numbers in the right direction.

Post Optimizer

Captions that actually
get people to stop scrolling.

Post Optimizer uses AI to generate and optimize every part of a social media post the caption, the hook, the hashtags, and even the audio or music pairing. It's built to take what you already have and push it to perform at its ceiling.

Instead of giving you a generic rewrite, it adapts the tone and structure to the specific platform you're posting on. A TikTok caption and a LinkedIn post require completely different energy Post Optimizer knows the difference and writes accordingly, every time.

What it optimizes
Hook strength in the first line
Platform-specific tone and length
Call-to-action placement and clarity
Hashtag relevance and density
Trending audio suggestions
Scored on
Hook strength (first 1–3 seconds)
Retention and pacing signals
Shareability and trend alignment
Caption and hashtag quality
Engagement trigger strength
Virality Calculator

Know if your post will
land before it's live.

The Virality Calculator analyzes a video or post and predicts how likely it is to go viral. It generates an overall virality score, individual scores across key performance dimensions, predicted engagement patterns, and a prioritized list of improvements you can make before you post.

It goes beyond surface-level metrics. The AI evaluates things like hook strength, retention signals, emotional pull, shareability, and trend alignment and explains exactly what's driving the score so you know what to fix and what to keep.

Cringe Calculator

Catch what's hurting you
before your audience does.

The Cringe Calculator analyzes your content for awkward, forced, or engagement-hurting elements that most creators are too close to their own work to spot. It gives you a cringe score and a detailed breakdown of exactly what's dragging your content down.

More importantly, it tells you how to fix it. Every issue it flags comes with a specific suggestion for improving the authenticity and quality of the content so you're not just getting a score, you're getting a clear path to a better post.

What it detects
Try-hard and forced language
Overused phrases and buzzwords
Hashtag spam and irrelevance
Late or dead trend chasing
Awkward energy and pacing issues
Works with
YouTube long-form videos
Uploaded MP4, MOV, AVI files
Podcast and interview recordings
Exports to Reels, TikTok, Shorts format
Auto-captions added to clips
Clip Studio

One long video.
Ten shareable clips.

Clip Studio automatically turns long-form videos into short clips optimized for TikTok, Instagram Reels, and YouTube. You upload the video, and the AI identifies the moments most likely to perform as standalone short content no manual scrubbing, no guesswork.

Each clip is exported in the correct vertical format for the platform you're targeting, and captions can be added automatically. It's the fastest way to get more content out of footage you've already recorded.

Engagement Graph

Stop guessing when
to post. Know.

The Engagement Graph analyzes a video timeline and shows you exactly where engagement is high and where it falls off. It identifies the strongest moments in your content, pinpoints the sections causing viewers to leave, and gives you specific, actionable guidance on what to edit.

Instead of guessing why a video underperformed, you can see it a clear visual breakdown of your content's engagement curve, with annotations on the drop-off points and the high-retention moments worth recreating.

What you learn
Your audience's peak activity windows
Video drop-off points and why they happen
Engagement trends over time
High-retention moments worth recreating
Side-by-side comparison of your best and worst performing content

asked.

Absolutely. Pro comes with a 7-day free trial, no credit card required. You'll get full access to every feature so you can see exactly what you're getting before committing.

Legal

Privacy Policy.

Last updated: March 2026

1. Who We Are

Social Penguin is an AI-powered social media content platform operated by Social Penguin Ltd. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, store, and protect your personal information when you use our website and tools. By using Social Penguin, you agree to the practices described here.

2. What We Collect

When you create an account or use our tools, we may collect the following information:

  • Account information your name, email address, and password
  • Content you submit captions, videos, URLs, and hashtags you input into our tools
  • Usage data which tools you use, how often, and how long
  • Device and browser data IP address, browser type, operating system, and referring URLs
  • Payment information handled securely by our payment processor; we never store card details

3. How We Use Your Data

We use your data to provide and improve the Social Penguin platform, process your requests and generate AI analysis results, communicate with you about your account, and send product updates if you've opted in. We do not sell your personal data to third parties.

4. AI Analysis and Content

Content you submit for analysis including video frames, captions, and metadata is processed by our AI infrastructure to generate your results. We may retain anonymized, aggregated data to improve model performance. We do not use your personal content to train models that are shared with third parties.

5. Cookies

We use cookies to keep you logged in, remember your preferences, and understand how people use Social Penguin. You can disable cookies in your browser settings, though some features may not work correctly without them.

6. Data Retention

We retain your account data for as long as your account is active. If you delete your account, we will remove your personal data within 30 days, except where we are required to retain it by law.

7. Your Rights

Depending on where you live, you may have the right to access, correct, or delete the personal data we hold about you. To make a request, contact us at our contact page.

8. Security

We use industry-standard encryption and access controls to protect your data. No system is completely secure, but we take reasonable steps to protect your information from unauthorized access, loss, or misuse.

9. Changes to This Policy

We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. We'll notify you of significant changes by email or by displaying a notice on the platform. Your continued use of Social Penguin after changes take effect constitutes acceptance of the updated policy.

Questions? Contact us

Legal

Terms of Service.

Last updated: March 2026

1. Acceptance of Terms

By creating an account or using any Social Penguin tool, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree to these terms, do not use the platform. These terms apply to all users, including free and paid plan holders.

2. What Social Penguin Provides

Social Penguin is an AI-powered content optimization platform. We provide tools including the Post Optimizer, Virality Calculator, Cringe Calculator, Clip Studio, and Engagement Graph to help creators improve their social media content. We do not guarantee specific results, follower growth, or viral performance from using our tools.

3. Your Account

You are responsible for maintaining the security of your account credentials and for all activity that occurs under your account. You must be at least 16 years old to create an account. You may not share your account with others or create multiple accounts to circumvent usage limits.

4. Acceptable Use

You agree not to use Social Penguin to:

  • Upload content that is illegal, defamatory, or infringes on third-party intellectual property
  • Attempt to reverse-engineer, scrape, or exploit our AI systems
  • Automate requests in a way that disrupts platform performance
  • Use the platform to generate spam, misinformation, or manipulative content

5. Intellectual Property

All content you submit remains yours. By submitting content for analysis, you grant Social Penguin a limited, non-exclusive license to process that content to deliver the service you requested. We do not claim ownership of your content. The Social Penguin platform, branding, and AI models are owned by Social Penguin Ltd and may not be copied or reproduced without permission.

6. Subscription and Billing

Paid plans are billed on a monthly or annual basis. You may cancel at any time from your account settings. Cancellations take effect at the end of your current billing period you will retain access until then. We do not offer refunds for partial billing periods unless required by law.

7. Service Availability

We aim for high availability but do not guarantee uninterrupted access to the platform. Scheduled maintenance, unexpected outages, or third-party service disruptions may occasionally affect availability. We are not liable for losses resulting from downtime.

8. Limitation of Liability

Social Penguin is provided "as is." To the fullest extent permitted by law, we are not liable for any indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from your use of the platform, including lost revenue, lost data, or missed opportunities.

9. Changes to These Terms

We may update these Terms of Service from time to time. We'll notify you of material changes via email. Continued use of the platform after changes take effect constitutes acceptance of the new terms.

10. Contact

For questions about these terms, contact us here.

Social Penguin Ltd © 2026. All rights reserved.
